metadata.description: MCP server for AI image generation (Gemini / Nano Banana) and upload to S3-compatible storage (Cloudflare R2, AWS S3, MinIO, etc.) with automatic prompt optimization

plugins.name: mcp-media-toolkit
plugins.description: Generate AI images with Google Gemini (Nano Banana) and upload to any S3-compatible storage in a single MCP tool call. Includes Claude Code skills with automatic prompt optimization.
